creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Eugene Grosbein from comment #5)
Why do you think more than one -d option makes any difference? It should not.

That said, with lld the -d option is really non-functional, in the sense that it does not do anything. Newer versions warn about this being obsolete, so that's why the option is removed for lld >= 14.
